info.title: MyHours API
info.description: These are the endpoints available in the MH API. Some of them require authorization, which you can do by making a POST request to the /api/Tokens/login endpoint. See endpoint for details.

post.summary: Generate new access token (ALSO USED ON MOBILE)
post.description:
Please use the following sample to authenticate yourself. Update it with your email and password. Upon successful authentication, your access token will be automatically included in future requests, granting you access to restricted endpoints.
            
    {
       "grantType": "password",
       "email": "YOUR EMAIL HERE",
       "password": "YOUR PASSWORD HERE",
       "clientId": "swagger"
    }

400.description: Bad Request

dateFormat.description:
Possible values:
MM/DD/YYYY
DD/MM/YYYY
YYYY-MM-DD
DD.MM.YYYY
DD-MM-YYYY
MM-DD-YYYY

lockInterval.description:
For LockType Hourly LockInterval values can be 1,2,3,7,14.
For LockType Monthly LockInterval values must be between 1-31, where 31 means the last day of the month.
For LockType Weekly LockInterval values must be between 0-6, where 0 means monday and 6 means sunday.

companyLogo.description:
CompanyLogo should be provided as Base64 encoded string
Base64 encoded file should have MIME type provided
We only accept image/jpg, image/jpeg, image/gif and image/png files.

keyPrefix.description: first 5 characters of the original API key

key.description: plain key - only returned the first time after creation

Spica.MyHours.Invoices.Dtos.UpdateInvoic.description:
If the property is not specified in the body it won't be updated
For the string properties use empty string if you want to reset the value

successUrl.description: Url that will be use to redirect after success

paymentMethodTypes.description:
List of payment method types as strings: card, paypal, ...
Link to full list: https://stripe.com/docs/api/checkout/sessions/create?lang=dotnet
